_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: This interpretation was supported by the western blot and RT–qPCR analyses on the material from the same experiments, which showed a significant reduction in MMP2 protein level and mRNA, respectively
details: Western blot analysis showed significant reduction in MMP2 protein level in miR-29c transfected cells
